pages.text: The $(item)Witch Hut Skyseed$() — a $(item)Cauldron$() and a $(item)brown mushroom$() over two $(item)oak planks$(). A witch, a cat, and brewing drops.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Brown mushrooms favour the shade of a $(item)Forest$() (or a $(item)Mushroom$() isle); the cauldron's iron from a $(item)Rocky$() core.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A little spruce hut on a muddy island, home to a $(item)witch$() and a stray $(item)cat$(). No chest here — the witch is the reward, dropping brewing ingredients when killed.

$(bold)A brewer's bounty$()$(br)Witch drops — redstone, glowstone dust, spider eye, sugar, sticks, glass bottles, gunpowder — are exactly the mid-game brewing kit. The cat scares off creepers and phantoms, and tames with raw fish. Crafted from $(item)oak planks$(), a $(item)brown mushroom$() and a $(item)cauldron$().
